capabilities.name: Lead capture from chat
capabilities.verify: ChatLeadCapture.tsx (dismissible email prompt after first visitor message, gated by chat settings leadCaptureEnabled, default OFF); capture_chat_lead RPC in 20260704150000 migration upserts lead by email (source 'chat-widget') and links chat_conversations.lead_id (session-ownership guarded, anon-safe SECURITY DEFINER)
capabilities.notes: Built 2026-07-04: settings toggle in ChatSettingsPage, prompt rendered via ChatConversation for visitor chat (widget/landing/block), never blocks the conversation. Dedupe via leads_email_unique (existing lead gets name backfill + score bump). Pending live verification + admin surfacing of the lead link before done.
